name: Bright Bean Salad
recipeIngredient: 9 oz (1 pkg) green beans, French-cut frozen
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the green beans according to package directions, reducing cooking time by 2 minutes so they remain crisp.
2. Drain the beans and toss with chopped carrot, onion, salt (if desired for low-sodium diets), and Lemon Shaker Dressing.
3. Chill in a covered container for several hours.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE CAL: 28; CHO: 7g; PRO: 1g; FAT: 0g; SOD: 113mg
